manager.bio: The 2022 champion and league Commissioner. Went from near-last in 2020 to champion in 2022, then crashed back to the Moodie Bowl in 2025 — the fastest championship-to-cellar swing in BMFFFL history. A living proof that dynasty is cyclical.

trades.note: Bought Tyreek before his Miami explosion. Anchored the 2022 championship run.
Sold Tyreek at peak, pivoted to Stroud. Perfect dynasty asset management.
Paid a premium for Rice. Suspension in 2024 wrecked the timeline.
Sold assets for picks in a desperate rebuild. The picks didn't land.

rivalries.description: The Commissioner vs the dynasty king. MLSchools12 eliminated Grandes in the 2022 semis before winning it all in reverse-year.
An even rivalry with a twist — Grandes beat JuicyBussy in the 2022 championship bracket to claim the title.
Tubes94's rise has corresponded with Grandes's fall. The torch passed in 2024.
